productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual Purple Slipper
description: Funky meets footloose in this pair of geometric-print slippers from numero uno. Comfort junkies, step up your style quotient with this pair, even as you experience superior comfort with the specially designed insole.UpperColourful fabric upper with thong straps and a toe separator Cushioned rubber footbed with elevated nubs for an all-day-massage feelPerforations on the footbed in the forefoot and midfoot area for ventilation water to drain outOutsoleTPR outsole with terraced grooves and a see-through upper mesh for grip, traction and easy draining away of waterSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
